_comment: Pricing-page URLs for the monthly refresh, in priority order (hosts that get search impressions first). Used as a reference by the /refresh-pricing playbook — fetch these, read the cheapest plan's promo + renewal, then run `node scripts/refresh-pricing.mjs set <host> '<patch>'`. Verify/correct a URL if it redirects. 'type' notes whether the simple auto-recompute is valid (shared/vps) or pricingCalculated must be set by hand (annual/free-tier/tiered).
_autoRecomputeSafe: Auto-recompute (pricingCalculated) is correct for traditional monthly promo->renewal hosts. For hetzner, liquidweb, render, porkbun, pressable, wpx and any PaaS, set pricingCalculated by hand — annual/free-tier nuance the formula can't reproduce.
